explanation: This command matches the Sigma rule by using the IEX (Invoke-Expression) pattern with a WebClient download. It is a direct representation of the suspicious behavior the rule is designed to detect.
This command uses the short form of the -Command option (-c) and omits extra parentheses, which is a valid syntactic variation of the original pattern.
This command removes spaces between IEX and the parentheses, which is a valid syntactic variation that still matches the Sigma rule.
This command removes spaces between IEX and (New-Object), which is a valid syntactic variation that still matches the Sigma rule.
This command matches the Sigma rule by using the WebClient DownloadFile method, which is another common pattern for downloading and executing malicious content.
This command uses the short form of the -Command option (-c) and is a valid syntactic variation of the DownloadFile method pattern.
